Projects

Active and archived projects tracked in this vault.

Active Projects

  • Project Alpha — Obsidian Jekyll Theme

Project Templates

Tip

Use this section to track project progress, decisions, and related notes.

Project Structure

Each project note should include:

  • Goal — What are you trying to achieve?
  • Status — Current state (planning, in progress, done)
  • Notes — Links to relevant concept and reference notes
  • Timeline — Key milestones and deadlines
